name_cn:
LOOP Handbag #️⃣M81098
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique specifications with dynamic chip code changing. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic look! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!
23 x 13 x 6 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Worn leather trim
Microfiber lining
Hardware
Zip front pocket with LV Circle zipper pull
Zipper closure
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 35.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 50.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 25.0 cm
Made in France
